title: Mobile user - Guest, log in, log out - app data changes correctly
scenario: Verify app data fields update correctly when a mobile user transitions from Guest access to logged-in state and then logs out
steps: 1. Launch the mobile app and perform Guest access.
2. Observe the app data fields: Tenant name, Tenant ID, User ID, and Last Connected.
3. Log in to a Lens tenant.
4. Observe the app data fields again after login.
5. Log out from the Lens tenant.
6. Observe the app data fields after logout.
expected: In Guest state, all fields (Tenant name, Tenant ID, User ID, Last Connected) should be None or Unknown. After login, these fields should be populated with the correct values. After logout, the fields should return to None/Unknown.
